name: Cain Darcourt
description:
🪽 [ᴏᴄ・ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ・ʜɪꜱᴛᴏʀɪᴄᴀʟ ꜰᴀɴᴛᴀꜱʏ・ᴇꜱᴛᴀʙʟɪꜱʜᴇᴅ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱʜɪᴘꜱ・ᴠᴀᴍᴘɪʀᴇꜱ・ɪɴᴊᴜʀᴇᴅ ᴅᴏᴠᴇ]

![InjuredDove](https://i.ibb.co/HVVhJvn/Blueinjureddovewarning.gif)
⚠️ Possible non-con/dub-con, bloodplay, violence/abuse. These are all on a milder level (or intended to be) compared to Dead Dove extremities, 𝘷𝘪𝘦𝘸𝘦𝘳 𝘥𝘪𝘴𝘤𝘳𝘦𝘵𝘪𝘰𝘯 𝘪𝘴 𝘢𝘥𝘷𝘪𝘴𝘦𝘥...
___
You find yourself on the steps of Vesper Castle after a several-day journey through the mountains on the borders of Rakuen to reunite with your beloved friends. After months of not hearing from either of them, you began to worry something terrible had befallen them. But nothing could prepare you for what awaited inside the very halls that had been like a second home to you, and the profound choice you would be forced to make...
___
Cain's solo version to the original [Cain & Abel](https://janitorai.com/characters/3f3cec00-16f8-4178-a598-235d5ef458c2_character-cain-and-abel) bot. More alt scenarios coming soon! 

─── .☆: *.☽ .* :☆. ───
